items.title: France braces for another day of sweltering heat as Europe heatwave spreads
items.dek: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
items.body: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire
items.dek: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.
items.body: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.
items.author: IriLine Desk
